title: helichrysum pumilio
intro: Helichrysum pumilio, also known as the Dwarf Helichrysum or Rock Helichrysum, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family, native to the Western Cape region of South Africa. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it a potential remedy for various health issues. The health benefits of Helichrysum pumilio include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as supporting the immune system and promoting wound healing. The plant's medicinal properties can be utilized through herbal preparations such as tea, tinctures, and infusions, making it a valuable addition to traditional medicine.
